meta.site_title: Daniel Sun | Top-tier Web and Brand Design partner for SaaS and Web3
meta.site_description: Create a brand or product website you'll be finally proud of. Trusted by Y-Combinator founders in fintech, e-commerce, and Web3.

hero.greeting_line1: Howdy! Meet your trusted design partner,
hero.greeting_line2: crafting strong brands for SaaS and Web3.

work.footer_note: New cases are on the way, slowly but surely 😅

story.section_title: Every experience in my life is important and has taught me a lot
story.secrets_line: I don't have dark secrets, only bright ones
story.bio_paragraph_1: Growing up in Ukraine, my journey into design started… on the streets =) As a teen, art and graffiti sparked my visual storytelling passion, architecture degree gave me foundation, and digital design showed new creative depths.
story.bio_paragraph_2: Five years later, my wife and I moved to Porto. Here, with the ocean breeze, I craft web and brand solutions for tech companies to shine.
story.bio_paragraph_3: I partner up with dynamic tech teams reinventing tomorrow, from YC startups to enterprises and bootstrapped guys.
story.mission_statement: My mission: to craft unique, consistent, mature identities for SaaS and Web3 products, boosting user engagement, investor confidence, revenue, and industry respect — a design others will benchmark.
story.partner_statement: I partner up with dynamic founders reinventing tomorrow, from YC startups to enterprises and bootstrapped guys.

collab.heading: What my perfect collab looks like
collab.cta_hint: Tap this 'tiny' button to highlight your product =)
